inapp.guide: Google and GitHub sign-in are blocked inside in-app browsers (KakaoTalk, Instagram, etc.). Please open this page in an external browser like Chrome or Safari.
inapp.copied: Link copied. Paste it into your browser to continue.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to the Harness Dashboard.
login.agree_label_html: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

callback.success_login_sub: Redirecting to the home page shortly...
callback.err_github_already_linked: This GitHub account is already linked to another user ({email}).
callback.err_google_already_linked: This Google account is already linked to another user ({email}).
callback.err_email_exists_use_link: This email is already registered ({email}). Log in normally, then connect {provider} from your profile.
callback.err_invalid_state: Your authentication session has expired. Please try again.
callback.err_oauth_disabled: {provider} OAuth is disabled. Please contact your administrator.
callback.err_missing_code_or_state: The {provider} response was incomplete. Please try again.
callback.err_user_not_found: Could not find an account to connect.
callback.err_link_email_missing: The email to link is missing.
callback.err_user_create_failed: Failed to create a new account.
callback.err_suspended_reason: Your account has been suspended. Reason: {reason}
callback.err_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
callback.err_no_token: Did not receive an authentication token.

invite.accepted_msg: You are now a member of {team}.
invite.card_intro: {inviter} invited you to the {team} team.
invite.login_required: Log in first to accept this invite.
invite.paywall_html: Joining a team requires a Pro plan or higher.
invite.err_not_found: The invite could not be found or has already expired.
invite.err_paywall: Joining a team requires a Pro plan or higher. Please upgrade your plan and try again.
